{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323024830B9784C31DFAF4544B46B"}"},"total":71},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7592532284938208024","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到最新章节。主线叙事清晰，故事推进有序，目前还没看到有毒情节。
知道作者想写多女，但故事内核其实在系统带来的改变上，描写女性过多容易跑偏主题。作为读者想要看的是：如何通过系统给予的神级能力，让主角批着外卖服装去“装逼”。
千万不要写成大仲马！女性最为点缀就好。
希望作者越写越顺吧！
（只要看着顺心的，一般都给五星好评）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767779162,"group_id":"7539057161528151102","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N063J8Rr9PqxrA+S3Y9sMx1ltcTq/a4wu8W7olWRZ872","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/18442f8c2dda42caaa7ded5ee6f2ed22~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788370&x-signature=yolmirFhS0lo28TtRQcv3PWKz8g%3D","user_id":"4375669491898323","user_name":"龙行布雨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4375669491898323","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7539057161528151102","book_info":{"abstract":"我，林奇，一个毕业就失业的大学生，父母双亡，为了养妹妹当起了外卖员。直到那天，觉醒了【神级外卖系统】，专门给我派些奇葩订单，只要派单成功，就能获得一项满级技能。
后来当有人采访我，身为一个骑手需要具备哪些基本素养时，我摸着下巴，很严肃地告诉他：
首先，为了不超时，跑步速度比世界冠军还快，这是最基本的。
其次，要想汤撒不出一滴，车技就要够稳，人在漂移过弯，午餐稳如泰山。
然后，为了跟任何客户甚至动物都能顺畅沟通，我掌握的语言种类比联合国翻译还多，没错，联合国不懂狗语，但我懂！
最后，想要获得用户好评，能够熟练应对各种突发状况是基本素养，从为客户调琴，到用路边野草帮食物中毒的顾客紧急解毒，必须无所不通。
所以，我只想安安静静送个外卖而已，怎么全世界都觉得我是个隐世高人？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a578293533444b2adbe70b6e46f7acf0","author":"柳剑","author_id":"","book_id":"7539057161528151102","book_name":"让你送个外卖，你成全能大师了？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d8b0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":75,"name":"外卖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=75&name=外卖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7571789091176448574","read_count":"14924","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"647816"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"270","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,外卖,全能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o4223005b749ff2772d7665a000500e4d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779389310&x-signature=RmZrEfOSqzbk7qw163fcRGWQLuw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4053266229887132","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"121"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323024830B9784C31DFAF4544B46B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9673,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2456},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_au
